tagline: Ƙwarewa ta alatu kamar ba a taɓa yi ba
verify_email_desc: Shigar da lambar lamba 6 da aka aiko zuwa
forgot_password_desc: Shigar da adireshin imel ɗinka kuma za mu aiko maka da lambar tabbatarwa don sake saita kalmar sirrinka.
reset_password_desc: Ƙirƙiri sabuwar kalmar sirri don asusunka.
password_reset_success: An sake saita kalmar sirri cikin nasara!
network_error: Kuskuren hanyar sadarwa. Da fatan za a duba haɗin ka.
something_went_wrong: Wani abu ya faru ba daidai ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
profile_updated: An sabunta bayanan kai cikin nasara.
invalid_email: Da fatan za a shigar da ingantaccen adireshin imel
login_tagline:
Bi diddigin yanayin zuciyarka kuma sake
haɗa kai da al'ummarka
welcome_tagline:
Bi diddigin yanayin zuciyarka kuma
haɗa kai da mutane masu irin ra'ayin ka
your_posts_appear_here: Sakonnoninka za su bayyana a nan
saved_posts_appear_here: Sakonnoni da ka ajiye za su bayyana a nan
max_interests_allowed: Mafi yawan sha'awa 10 ake yarda da su
could_not_load_feed: Ba a iya loda jerin saƙonnoni ba
be_first_to_share: Kasance na farko don raba wani abu
permission_media_photos: Da fatan za a ba da damar shiga hotunanku a cikin Saituna.
permission_media_videos: Da fatan za a ba da damar shiga bidiyoyinku a cikin Saituna.
max_media_allowed: Mafi yawan fayilolin kafofin watsa labaru {count} ake yarda da su
max_hashtags_allowed: Mafi yawan hashtag {count} ake yarda da su
link_copied: An kwafi hanyar haɗi zuwa clipboard
no_following_yet: Ba a bin kowa tukuna ba
mood_camera_desc: ENOM yana amfani da kyamarar gabanka don nazarin bayyanar fuska da gano yanayin zuciyarka na yanzu. Ana sarrafa bayanan fuskarka a cikin na'urarka kuma ba a taɓa adana ko raba su ba.
mood_camera_privacy: Sirrinku yana da muhimmanci — duk sarrafa yana faruwa ne a cikin na'urarku.
mood_camera_denied_desc: Don gano yanayin zuciyarku, ENOM yana buƙatar samun kyamara. Taɓa ƙasa don sake gwadawa.
mood_camera_perm_denied_desc: An ƙi samun kyamara har abada. Da fatan za a kunna shi a cikin saitunan na'urarku don amfani da gano yanayin zuciya.
mood_camera_restricted_desc: An taƙaita samun kyamara a wannan na'ura, mai yiwuwa saboda ikon iyaye. Da fatan za a duba saitunan na'urarku.
mood_scan_low_light: An gano ƙarancin haske — gwada kunna walƙiya
mood_scan_error: Ba a iya gano yanayin zuciya ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
mood_scan_no_face: Ba a gano fuska ba. Da fatan za a sanya fuskarka a tsakiya.
mood_msg_happy: Kana fitar da ƙarfin hali mai kyau! Ci gaba da yada waɗannan kyawawan ji.
mood_msg_calm: Kana cikin yanayin zaman lafiya na hankali. Lokaci mai kyau don tunani.
mood_msg_sad: Ya halatta a ji haka. Ka ɗauki lokaci don kula da kanka.
mood_msg_angry: Ka huta sosai. Ka yi tunani a kan gajeren tafiya ko tunani.
mood_msg_surprised: Wani abu ya jawo hankalinka! Kasance mai sha'awa.
mood_msg_neutral: Kana cikin yanayin daidaitawa. Hankali mai natsuwa hankali ne mai haske.
mood_msg_default: Duba fuskarka don gano yanayin zuciyarka na yanzu.
coming_soon: Na zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
